series_metadata.series_description: This retention schedule consists of, but is not limited to, documents, photographs, tapes, CD''s or copies of records gathered or generated from a Division audit of a cemetery. These records will contain confidential information such as personal tax identification numbers or personal information such as bank account numbers and/or bank statements. Tax identification numbers are confidential pursuant to 26 USC Section 6103.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Records maintained in paper form shall be maintained six years from date audit was conducted by Division. ; Electronic: Any records maintained in machine readable form shall be maintained six years from date audit was conducted by Division. ; Microform: Any records maintained in microform shall be maintained six years from date audit was conducted by Division
retention_rules.disposition_method: Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase ; Microform: Shred
